case_title: JACKY CHI FUNG LAI et al VS. PHYLLIS D. TYREE-SWINDELL et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-30-2010 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $39.75) SERVED FEB-13-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SWINDELL, LEON A.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $79.50) SERVED FEB-24-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TYREE-SWINDELL, PHYLLIS D.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-30-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-30-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LAI, JACKY CHI FUNG HUANG, TIAN XIAO HELEN AS TO DEFENDANT TYREE-SWINDELL, PHYLLIS D. SWINDELL, LEON A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAI, JACKY CHI FUNG HUANG, TIAN XIAO HELEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TYREE-SWINDELL, PHYLLIS D. SWINDELL, LEON A. PLAINTIFFS PURCHASED THE PROPERTY "AS-IS". THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED DID NOT ESTABLISH FRAUD OR INTENTIONAL MISREPRESENTATION BY DEFENDANT CONCERNING WATER LEAKS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
